title: Peter Aloysius Harjanto
text: Home * People * Peter Aloysius Harjanto Peter Aloysius Harjanto [1] Peter Aloysius Harjanto , (Peter Alloysius) an Indonesian computer scientist, IT professional, chess player and as computer chess programmer author of the free WinBoard chess engine Petir [2] . While student at STTS from 2000 until 2004, he represented STTS to win several chess championships in Surabaya [3] .
